channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Becerra's debate-stage beating: Rivals confront Dem California candidate over campaign scandal
item.description: California governor candidate Becerra denies wrongdoing after former staffers pleaded guilty to stealing $225,000 from his inactive campaign account.

item.title: Black Caucus Seats Threatened by Redistricting Fight
item.description: Democrats warn that one-third of the Congressional Black Caucus could lose seats by the 2028 election cycle amid the national redistricting battle.

item.title: Rep. Cohen Won't Seek Reelection Amid Map Fight
item.description: Rep. Steve Cohen, D-Tenn., announced Friday he is ending his reelection bid as redistricting disputes sweep the country after last month's S...

item.title: Eric Trump Torches Psakiâs âMonolog of Lies,â Vows Massive MSNOW Lawsuit
